description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs three build jobs (build_fedora, build_mageia, build_opensuse) in the build stage, each using its respective Docker image (fedora:latest, mageia:latest, opensuse/leap:latest) and tagged with the shared runner tag. Include a global before_script that runs "mkdir output" and configure a cache of "/var/cache/dnf". In build_fedora and build_mageia jobs, run "dnf --assumeyes install python3 dnf distribution-gpg-keys squashfs-tools" then "source /etc/os-release; ./mkrpmdistcoresnap -d $ID -r $VERSION_ID -n -o ./output"; in build_opensuse run "zypper refresh", "zypper --non-interactive install python3 dnf distribution-gpg-keys squashfs" and the same source and mkrpmdistcoresnap command. Each job should publish the generated "./output/*.snap" files as artifacts that expire after 14 days.
